outcome_statement: Internal code consistency improved: shared availability fetch utility extracted, BookPageSearchPanel label props grouped into a bag, RoomQueryState type centralised in one location.
why: Three bounded internal quality issues surfaced during a whole-site simplify review — duplicate debounce logic, inconsistent props pattern, and scattered inline type union.
validation: pnpm --filter @apps/brikette typecheck && pnpm --filter @apps/brikette lint — both pass
